title: CXXRTL: "Assert `!for_debug' failed" caused by the "-noflatten" option
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.29+44 (git sha1 88c849d11, gcc 8.3.0-6 -fPIC -Os)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

Verilog file `gen.v`:
```verilog
module inner(
    input sub_i, output sub_o
);
    assign sub_o = !sub_i;
endmodule

module gen (
    input [3:0] in,
    output [3:0] out
);
    // input -> sub_output_vec
    wire [3:0] sub_output_vec;
    inner l [3:0] (.sub_i(in), .sub_o(sub_output_vec));
    // sub_output_vec -> out
    assign out = sub_output_vec;
endmodule
```

Yosys script:
```
read_verilog gen.v; hierarchy -check -top gen
write_cxxrtl -noflatten gen.cpp
```

### Expected Behavior

C++ code was written to `gen.cpp`.

### Actual Behavior

Yosys crashed with:
```
 /----------------------------------------------------------------------------\
 |                                                                            |
 |  yosys -- Yosys Open SYnthesis Suite                                       |
 |                                                                            |
 |  Copyright (C) 2012 - 2020  Claire Xenia Wolf <claire@yosyshq.com>         |
 |                                                                            |
 |  Permission to use, copy, modify, and/or distribute this software for any  |
 |  purpose with or without fee is hereby granted, provided that the above    |
 |  copyright notice and this permission notice appear in all copies.         |
 |                                                                            |
 |  THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND THE AUTHOR DISCLAIMS ALL WARRANTIES  |
 |  WITH REGARD TO THIS SOFTWARE INCLUDING ALL IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF          |
 |  MERCHANTABILITY AND FITNESS. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE AUTHOR BE LIABLE FOR   |
 |  ANY SPECIAL, DIRECT, INDIRECT, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES OR ANY DAMAGES    |
 |  WHATSOEVER RESULTING FROM LOSS OF USE, DATA OR PROFITS, WHETHER IN AN     |
 |  ACTION OF CONTRACT, NEGLIGENCE OR OTHER TORTIOUS ACTION, ARISING OUT OF   |
 |  OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE USE OR PERFORMANCE OF THIS SOFTWARE.            |
 |                                                                            |
 \----------------------------------------------------------------------------/

 Yosys 0.29+44 (git sha1 88c849d11, gcc 8.3.0-6 -fPIC -Os)


-- Executing script file `crash.ys' --

1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend: gen.v
Parsing Verilog input from `gen.v' to AST representation.
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\inner'.
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\gen'.
Successfully finished Verilog frontend.

2. Executing HIERARCHY pass (managing design hierarchy).

2.1. Analyzing design hierarchy..
Top module:  \gen
Used module:     \inner

2.2. Analyzing design hierarchy..
Top module:  \gen
Used module:     \inner
Removed 0 unused modules.

3. Executing CXXRTL backend.

3.1. Executing HIERARCHY pass (managing design hierarchy).

3.1.1. Analyzing design hierarchy..
Top module:  \gen
Used module:     \inner

3.1.2. Analyzing design hierarchy..
Top module:  \gen
Used module:     \inner
Removed 0 unused modules.

3.2. Executing PROC pass (convert processes to netlists).

3.2.1. Executing PROC_CLEAN pass (remove empty switches from decision trees).
Cleaned up 0 empty switches.

3.2.2. Executing PROC_RMDEAD pass (remove dead branches from decision trees).
Removed a total of 0 dead cases.

3.2.3. Executing PROC_PRUNE pass (remove redundant assignments in processes).
Removed 0 redundant assignments.
Promoted 0 assignments to connections.

3.2.4. Executing PROC_INIT pass (extract init attributes).

3.2.5. Executing PROC_ARST pass (detect async resets in processes).

3.2.6. Executing PROC_ROM pass (convert switches to ROMs).
Converted 0 switches.

3.2.7. Executing PROC_MUX pass (convert decision trees to multiplexers).

3.2.8. Executing PROC_DLATCH pass (convert process syncs to latches).

3.2.9. Executing PROC_DFF pass (convert process syncs to FFs).

3.2.10. Executing PROC_MEMWR pass (convert process memory writes to cells).

3.2.11. Executing PROC_CLEAN pass (remove empty switches from decision trees).
Cleaned up 0 empty switches.

3.2.12. Executing OPT_EXPR pass (perform const folding).
Optimizing module gen.
Optimizing module inner.

Module `inner' contains buffered combinatorial wires:
  sub_o
Warning: Design contains buffered combinatorial wires, which require delta cycles during evaluation.
Flattening may eliminate buffered combinatorial wires from the design.
<suppressed ~11 debug messages>
ERROR: Assert `!for_debug' failed in backends/cxxrtl/cxxrtl_backend.cc:1325.
```

---

By the way, after removing the `sub_output_vec` wire, the assertion failure is gone!

The following input `gen.v` works well.
```verilog
module inner(
    input sub_i, output sub_o
);
    assign sub_o = !sub_i;
endmodule

module gen (
    input [3:0] in,
    output [3:0] out
);
    inner l [3:0] (.sub_i(in), .sub_o(out));
endmodule
```

---

P.S. I found #2521 reported the same assertion failure 2 years ago. It seemed to be fixed later. So I guess the situation above might be a different case.

https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/blob/88c849d112f4f8cf20617bbc98eac055956269c2/backends/cxxrtl/cxxrtl_backend.cc#L1325

Please tell me if there is anything more I can do to help locate this problem!
